# Get Quantum Ready with your GPUs – today
## Get Instant access to the hand book
Full Name *Email *I agree with Terms & conditions and [Privacy](https://www.bqpsim.com/privacy-policy)
Thank you! Your submission has been received!
Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.
Why engineers trust BQPhy®
  * Peer-reviewed quantum-inspired algorithms
  * Compatible with CUDA, ROCm & hybrid stacks
  * Trusted by Fortune 500 engineering teams


The definitive guide to quantum-inspired engineering workflows. Get more from your existing GPU stack while building tomorrow’s quantum advantage.
  * Quantum-inspired algorithms for real GPU workloads
  * Step-by-step migration to hybrid quantum workflows
  * Performance benchmarks vs classical solvers
  * BQPhy QuantumNOW integration playbook


![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/6a15d955627d4e791b197f9a_Cover.png)
### QuantumNOW™  
Practical Handbook
BQPhy® Engineering Team
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67f3db593b0d97779485e24f_close.png)
For MATLAB Environment
# BQPhy® Toolbox for MATLAB
BQPhy® Toolbox integrates BQPhy® QIO solver directly into your MATLAB workflows
Faster convergence, and scalable performance—with Quantum Inspired Optimization on MATLAB.
[Access BQPhy® toolbox](https://www.mathworks.com/matlabcentral/fileexchange/181395-bqphytoolbox)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/699446178a861828acfe7bb1_Thumbnail.png)
[cky_video_placeholder_title]
Step 01
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/69b3bc31ce3e9b0edcd16295_PHOTO-2026-03-13-11-44-34.jpg)
Download & Install
Add the BQPhy® Toolbox via MATLAB’s Add-On Manager.
Step 02
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/699c2f89ec54fa3e877affae_Native%20MATLAB%20-%20Activate%20License.png)
Activate License
Run bqphy_login to securely connect MATLAB to the BQP cloud engine.
Step 03
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/699c2f8cbb94ab06961e5689_Native%20MATLAB%20-%20Optimize.png)
Optimize
Replace your legacy solver call with bqphy_solve.
Ready to Benchmark Your First Most Complex Model?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/6992c150b00c6e62d93d3583_image%201641.png)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/6992eb81aabb8cdebe2437b3_Group%201410103804.png)
Register for BQPhy® MATLAB Tool Access
[Register](https://www.bqpsim.com/start-free-trial)
Built to Run on Your Existing MATLAB Stack
Integrate BQPhy® QIO Solver into MATLAB workflows seamlessly. If you can run MATLAB, you’re ready to run large-scale optimization using Quantum Inspired Algorithms that offer signficant speedup and accuracy.
[Get Guide](https://dev-docs.bosonqpsi.com/)
Related Articles
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/699431990d1371ab6a3f7d1f_Rectangle%20240649836.png) Quantum-Inspired Optimization of Multi-Phase Anti-Ship Missile Terminal Trajectories.](https://www.bqpsim.com/blogs/multi-phase-terminal-trajectories-qio)[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/69945f4a4b9513ea5ae57fe4_Rectangle%20240649837.png) Missile Fire Plans for Defended Airfields: Multi-Objective Optimization using Quantum.](https://www.bqpsim.com/blogs/missile-fire-plan-optimization)[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/69945fe3badcdaaadcf493b1_Rectangle%20240649838.png) See how Quantum Inspired Evolutionary Optimization Enhances Satellite Placement.](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/see-how-quantum-inspired-evolutionary-optimization-enhances-satellite-placement)
MATLAB Environment
MATLAB R2020b or higher
Supported Operating Systems
Linux
Ubuntu 22.04+  
RHEL 8.x / 9.x  
SLES 15.x / 16.x 
Windows
Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit) 
Hardware Requirements
Multicore x86 architecture  
Minimum 8 CPU cores 
Memory
Minimum: 2 GB RAM  
Recommended: 4 GB RAM
